antipattern.symptom: Routine skipped 4 Mondays; pipeline opaque; surprises in close-rate.
10 closed-lost opps no reasons; quarterly win/loss review useless.
antipattern.fix: Schema rejects loss without bounded-enum reason.

antipattern.symptom: Stuck >30d opps multiply; pipeline-value vibes upward but conversion plummets.
antipattern.fix: Item 2 forces explicit stuck-marking with reason.

antipattern.symptom: Marketing spend reallocates blindly; CAC ratio undefined per channel.
antipattern.fix: Item 5 enforces source tag on new opps.
